lines: Butters is living his best life after Portugal absolutely humiliated Croft's Uzbekistan 5-0 last night — five fucking goals, Croft, you absolute melt, hope you enjoyed that.

England managed a heroic 0-0 with Ghana, which means Carter and Wilmot are sharing both the points AND the shame of watching their boys sleepwalk through 90 minutes like they'd been on the piss since Tuesday.

Dene is sitting on 7 points looking like a man who drew the short straw at a raffle held in hell — Bosnia AND Qatar are both on 1 point and playing EACH OTHER today, so at least one of his nightmare teams will finally win something.

Morocco today is basically a free money printer for Callum, Butters, Jim AND Wilmot — they're playing Haiti who have zero points and the tactical nous of a pub team, so if the Atlas Lions don't batter them it's an actual crisis.
Keep your eyes on Group B today — Switzerland vs Canada could decide who tops the group and neither Dene nor Jim can afford their dead-eyed squads to keep pissing about at the bottom.
